# SnowflakePySparkIOManager

PySpark variant of snowflake_io_manager. Wraps the official `dagster-snowflake-pyspark` package.

Wraps the official `dagster-snowflake-pyspark` package.

<!-- FIELDS:START - auto-generated by tools/regen_readme_fields.py -->

## Fields

### Required

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `account` | `str` | Snowflake account. |
| `database` | `str` | Snowflake database. |

### Connection

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `resource_key` | `str` | `"io_manager"` | Dagster resource key. |
| `user_env_var` | `str` | `"SNOWFLAKE_USER"` | Env var with username. |
| `password_env_var` | `str` | `"SNOWFLAKE_PASSWORD"` | Env var with password. |
| `warehouse` | `str` | — | Snowflake warehouse. |
| `role` | `str` | — | Snowflake role. |

### Other

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `schema_name` | `str` | `"PUBLIC"` | Snowflake schema. |

<!-- FIELDS:END -->
